documents.title: Paired Run Acceptance Contract
documents.summary: Contract for paired-run acceptance based on score win, relative gain, valid-ratio guard, completion guard, and policy compliance.

documents.title: Two-Stage RAG Iteration Contract
documents.summary: Contract for query-alignment, density-refinement, source-variant search, and stage-gated promotion to stage 2.

documents.title: HGS Penalty-Bounded Move Pruning
documents.summary: Several HGS-CVRP route-improvement moves use a quick lower-bound test on supplemental distance terms versus current route penalties before evaluating full load and duration effects.

documents.title: HGS-CVRP SWAP Star Preprocessing
documents.summary: HGS-CVRP makes expensive cross-route SWAP star moves practical by preprocessing insertion costs and pruning route pairs before full evaluation.

documents.title: PyVRP Cost Evaluator Delta Proposals
documents.summary: PyVRP computes move quality through route proposals passed to CostEvaluator, which can shortcut losing moves but must be exact for any move that is actually applied.

documents.title: PyVRP Exchange Delta Evaluation
documents.summary: PyVRP treats delta cost as an exact local contract for exchange moves, not as a heuristic proxy.

documents.title: CVRPLIB Instance Family Index
documents.summary: CVRPLIB groups benchmark instances into named historical families that act as stable evaluation labels.

documents.title: PyVRP Benchmark Gap and Diagnostics
documents.summary: PyVRP's basic CVRP example treats benchmark evaluation as more than an objective number by explicitly loading best-known solutions, computing percentage gaps, and exposing search diagnostics.

documents.title: PyVRP VRPLIB Format Contract
documents.summary: PyVRP documents the VRPLIB fields and defaults that determine how a benchmark file becomes an in-memory instance.

documents.title: Search History Record Schema
documents.summary: Schema for reconstructing governed search-history records from emitted runtime lines rather than from prose summaries.

documents.title: ProgramsDatabase Island Cycle Contract
documents.summary: Contract for island-scoped history, score signatures, cluster sampling, and reset behavior.

documents.title: Run Log Signal Contract
documents.summary: Contract for RUN_METADATA, EVAL_SUMMARY, and RETRIEVAL_DIAGNOSTICS as the authoritative runtime signals.

documents.title: Vidal 2016 abstract node
documents.summary: Abstract node for the governed COR 2016 Split paper package.
documents.paper_title: Technical Note: Split algorithm in O(n) for the capacitated vehicle routing problem

documents.title: Vidal 2016 experiments node
documents.summary: Experiments node for the governed COR 2016 Split paper package.
documents.paper_title: Technical Note: Split algorithm in O(n) for the capacitated vehicle routing problem

documents.title: Vidal 2016 flow description node
documents.summary: Flow-description node for the governed COR 2016 Split paper package.
documents.paper_title: Technical Note: Split algorithm in O(n) for the capacitated vehicle routing problem

documents.title: Vidal 2016 introduction node
documents.summary: Introduction node for the governed COR 2016 Split paper package.
documents.paper_title: Technical Note: Split algorithm in O(n) for the capacitated vehicle routing problem

documents.title: Vidal 2016 methodology node
documents.summary: Methodology node for the governed COR 2016 Split paper package.
documents.paper_title: Technical Note: Split algorithm in O(n) for the capacitated vehicle routing problem

documents.title: Vidal 2016 pseudocode node
documents.summary: Pseudocode node for the governed COR 2016 Split paper package.
documents.paper_title: Technical Note: Split algorithm in O(n) for the capacitated vehicle routing problem

documents.title: Vidal 2016 results node
documents.summary: Results node for the governed COR 2016 Split paper package.
documents.paper_title: Technical Note: Split algorithm in O(n) for the capacitated vehicle routing problem

documents.title: HGS Granular Route Improvement
documents.summary: HGS-CVRP runs route-improvement moves under a granular correlated-vertex restriction and skips stale route pairs by remembering when nodes and routes were last modified.

documents.title: HGS-CVRP Local Search Move Set
documents.summary: HGS-CVRP engineers a fixed move set with penalised cost evaluation and specialised handling for expensive cross-route exchanges.

documents.title: jsprit Insertion Strategy Family
documents.summary: jsprit separates best, cheapest, regret, regret-fast, and position-based regret insertions as named factories, so insertion behavior can be weighted and selected independently.

documents.title: jsprit Ruin And Recreate Catalog
documents.summary: jsprit makes large-neighbourhood search explicit through a catalogue of ruin strategies coupled with separate insertion modules.

documents.title: jsprit Ruin Strategy Family
documents.summary: jsprit implements a broad ruin family including random, radial, worst, cluster, kruskal-cluster, and string ruin, each as a named factory with its own removal logic.

documents.title: PyVRP Empty Route and Fixed Cost Moves
documents.summary: PyVRP treats empty routes as a special move context because relocate and tail-swap operators can change route usage and therefore fixed-vehicle costs.
documents.paper_title: PyVRP Empty Route and Fixed Cost Moves

documents.title: PyVRP Operator Catalog
documents.summary: PyVRP exposes an explicit catalogue of node and route operators rather than treating neighbourhood choice as an unnamed implementation detail.

documents.title: PyVRP SwapTails as 2-opt Star
documents.summary: PyVRP's SwapTails operator is the inter-route 2-opt* move, implemented with explicit fixed-cost handling for routes that become empty or non-empty after the exchange.

documents.title: VeRyPy Inter-Route Move Family
documents.summary: VeRyPy implements inter-route 2-opt*, one-point, and two-point exchange moves with explicit capacity checks and first-accept or best-accept search strategies.

documents.title: VeRyPy Sweep Improvement Pipeline
documents.summary: VeRyPy's Wren-Holliday sweep variant layers inspect, single-customer improvement, delete, and pair phases on top of the angular sweep constructor instead of stopping at raw route construction.

documents.title: Runtime Variant And Logging Contract
documents.summary: Contract for single-source runtime configuration, derived corpus roots, RAG overrides, and tee logging.

documents.title: Sampler Prompt Enrichment And Dispatch Contract
documents.summary: Contract for how Sampler clamps batch budget, enriches prompts with retrieval context, emits diagnostics, and dispatches samples to evaluators.
documents.paper_title: Sampler Prompt Enrichment And Dispatch Contract

documents.title: Governed Chunk Retrieval Contract
documents.summary: Contract for governed chunk scoring, summary and leaf selection, skip policy, and context pruning.

documents.title: Dataset Instance Contract
documents.summary: Contract for how CVRP instances are loaded and which keys the evaluator reads.

documents.title: Evaluate Entrypoint Contract
documents.summary: Contract for the evaluate entrypoint, sandbox execution, and numeric scoring requirement.

documents.title: Numba Acceleration Contract
documents.summary: Contract for how the runtime injects numba.jit and what that implies for evolved priority code.

documents.title: Priority Function Contract
documents.summary: Contract for the evolving priority function and how its score vector is consumed.

documents.title: Sandbox Execution Contract
documents.summary: Contract for per-instance sandbox execution, timeout handling, and numeric result validation.

documents.title: HGS Population Diversity and Restart Policy
documents.summary: HGS-CVRP manages feasible and infeasible subpopulations separately, measures diversity with broken-pairs distance, and uses restart plus penalty adaptation as core population-control mechanisms.
documents.paper_title: HGS Population Diversity and Restart Policy

documents.title: HGS Split Decoder Variants
documents.summary: HGS-CVRP exposes split decoding as a separate component with distinct unlimited-fleet and limited-fleet variants, so giant-tour decoding is an independent solver atom rather than an inlined crossover post-step.

documents.title: jsprit Independent Operator Selection
documents.summary: jsprit can select ruin and insertion operators independently with weighted selectors, making operator composition a first-class search configuration rather than a fixed paired strategy list.

documents.title: PyVRP Local Search Contract
documents.summary: PyVRP exposes local improvement as a configurable engine built from neighbour lists and registered operators.

documents.title: PyVRP Local Search Statistics and Neighbourhoods
documents.summary: PyVRP exposes local-search operators, neighbourhood lists, and per-run statistics as explicit interfaces, so neighbourhood control is part of the public search contract rather than hidden implementation state.
documents.paper_title: PyVRP Local Search Statistics and Neighbourhoods

documents.title: VeRyPy Classical Heuristics Catalog
documents.summary: VeRyPy collects a broad catalogue of named CVRP construction and local-search heuristics in one benchmark-oriented codebase.

documents.title: VeRyPy Savings and Sweep Execution Modes
documents.summary: VeRyPy exposes classical constructors as callable execution modes, with parallel savings, sequential savings, and sweep variants each preserving the original algorithm family's control flow.
documents.paper_title: VeRyPy Savings and Sweep Execution Modes

documents.title: ALNS CVRP Destroy And Repair Pattern
documents.summary: The official ALNS CVRP example ties destroy-repair operators to an explicit mutable route state and measurable benchmark behavior.
documents.paper_title: ALNS CVRP Destroy And Repair Pattern

documents.title: ALNS Initialisation and Acceptance Scaffold
documents.summary: The official ALNS CVRP example couples a nearest-neighbor seed with roulette-wheel operator selection and record-to-record travel acceptance, making the search scaffold explicit apart from the destroy and repair operators.

documents.title: ALNS String Removal Improvement Pattern
documents.summary: The ALNS CVRP example shows that moving from random removal to substring-based removal materially changes solution quality on ORTEC-n242-k12 while keeping the repair side simple.

documents.title: OR-Tools CVRP Capacity Dimension Contract
documents.summary: OR-Tools models CVRP capacity feasibility with a demand callback and a routing dimension.

documents.title: OR-Tools Infeasibility and Dropping Visits
documents.summary: OR-Tools treats infeasible CVRP instances as a search problem that may require time limits or drop-visit penalties rather than as a special-case modeling branch.

documents.title: OR-Tools Search Strategy for CVRP
documents.summary: The OR-Tools CVRP example separates the capacity model from the search policy by pairing PATH_CHEAPEST_ARC construction with GUIDED_LOCAL_SEARCH improvement under a strict time limit.
